Initializes the Nimble store in the Bluetooth firmware.

# Purpose
This code is a simple C header file that defines an interface for initializing a component named `nimble_store`. It includes an include guard to prevent multiple inclusions of the header file, which is defined by the macro `_NIMBLE_STORE_H_`. The file declares a single function, [`nimble_store_init`](<#nimble_store_init>), which is intended to initialize the `nimble_store` component. The header file does not provide the implementation of the function, which must be defined elsewhere.
# Function Declarations (Public API)

---
### nimble\_store\_init<!-- {{#callable_declaration:nimble_store_init}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../src/bluetooth-fw/nimble/nimble_store.h#L20>)

Initializes the NimBLE store callbacks.
- **Description**: Use this function to set up the necessary callbacks for the NimBLE store operations. It must be called before any store operations are performed to ensure that the read, write, delete, and key generation functionalities are properly configured. This function does not take any parameters and does not return a value. It is essential to call this function during the initialization phase of the application to ensure that the NimBLE stack can interact with the store correctly.
- **Inputs**: None
- **Output**: None
- **See Also**: [`nimble_store_init`](<nimble_store.c.md#nimble_store_init>)  (Implementation)
